payload.title: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service
payload.description: Presentation to Community Board 4 covering project background, corridor design, traffic analysis, CB 4 design details, bus service planning, project timeline and next steps for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (Bx41 SBS) project.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service - Presentation to Community Board 4 | February 6, 2013

payload.description: SBS project on Webster Avenue from The Hub to Williamsbridge, converting Bx41 LTD to Bx41 SBS with offset bus lanes, bus bulb stations, off-board fare collection, transit signal priority, and pedestrian safety improvements

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS ■ 4 miles of offset bus lanes with bus bulb stations ■ For the entire route: – Off-board fare collection – Low-floor buses – Station and bus branding – Transit signal priority – Pedestrian safety improvements

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: SBS Corridor timeline
tool_args.raw_text: June 2008 Fordham Rd (Bx12), Oct 2010 1st/2nd Ave (M15), Nov 2011 34th St (M34/34A), Sept 2012 Hylan Blvd (S79), 2013 Webster Ave (Bx41), 2013 Nostrand Ave (B44), 2013/14 LaGuardia Airport (M60)

payload.claim_text: SBS Corridor timeline: June 2008 Fordham Rd (Bx12), Oct 2010 1st/2nd Ave (M15), Nov 2011 34th St (M34/34A), Sept 2012 Hylan Blvd (S79), 2013 Webster Ave (Bx41), 2013 Nostrand Ave (B44), 2013/14 LaGuardia Airport (M60)
